overall.description: Third-person Unreal Engine 5 gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an expansive arid grassland with scattered scrub vegetation. The character traverses the open terrain under a clear blue sky, approaching massive red rock formations in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: arid grassland plain with dry vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the grassland with camera positioned at side angle showing profile view

entered.detail: expansive field of brown dry grass covering the ground
sparse low bushes dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open arid grassland with dry brown vegetation under a clear blue sky. The camera maintains a side profile view as the character moves steadily across the terrain with scattered scrub bushes visible in the distance.

events.description: camera rotates from side profile to rear view, revealing large red rock butte in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant rock formation through terrain with scattered bushes passing by on either side

entered.detail: massive flat-topped mesa with steep red cliffs dominating the horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to a rear follow view as the character walks toward a massive red rock formation rising from the plain. The character continues through the dry grassland passing scattered scrub vegetation while the prominent butte remains centered in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across an arid grassland that gradually focuses on a massive red rock formation. It begins with a side profile view of the character walking steadily through dry brown vegetation and scattered scrub bushes under a clear blue sky. As the character progresses, the camera shifts to a rear follow perspective, aligning the movement with the horizon. The scene then opens up to reveal a prominent red butte rising from the plain, which remains centered in the distance as the character continues through the open terrain.
